Implemented a few menu options for Event Folders. (more to come later)
UI changes for how the maximum character limit message shows.
Fine-tuning of the drag and drop experience. (fixed some UI glitches)
Fix for Note service offerings not adding to elements correctly. (the “Description” of the note type wasn’t being added to the element)
Fix for the pricing tab of inventory and services not being vertically scrollable.
Fix for certain status colors not showing properly in the calendar list view and project element list pages.
Fix for an error that occurred for some customers when adding lines to a financial element.
Fix for an error that showed when clicking Accept on the suggestions popup without selecting any lines.
Fix for the Sales Tax header block not responding.
Fix for the discount column on the detail view of financial elements not showing in % format.
Fix for an issue that would kick out note, blank, and misc lines when creating a custom subtotal.
Fix for collapsed subtotals (on a financial element) not showing the Ext. Price.
Fix for an error that showed when trying to create an element with a “Free Text” source address block.
Fix for an error that showed when double-clicking a contact parent folder.
Fix for the plural version of units of measure not showing properly.
Fix for an issue where barcodes with alpha characters were not rendering properly on some inventory tabs.
Fix for an issue that allowed you to add a note to a blank line.
Calendar “List View” implemented. (Modifying Calendar settings is not yet available in Flex5, but all settings from Flex4 will push to Flex5)

Improvements to the project element list pages (like Projects menu > Quotes, for example). Columns now populate based on Flex4 project element settings. (Filtering and sorting of these pages will be available in a future release)
Changed the position of the “…” menu on elements (no longer in the far right-hand column, and now showing next to the line item checkbox).
Event Folder basic UI implemented. Right-hand menu options are currently limited.

Improvements related to adding suggestions on a job, including a new option called “Add suggestions based on selection order” which, when that option is selected, will add items to a job based on the order that they were selected in the Suggestions popup instead of the order in which they appear in the parent model’s Suggestions tab.
Right-click on tab improvements (more options and new icons).
Fixes for creating maintenance logs, including image upload errors and OOC creation.
Session timeout improvements. When your session times out, you are now taken directly to the login page.
Various fixes and improvements for the “create new inventory model” process.
Fix for an issue that caused reordering of the Suggestion Types (on the Inventory menu) page when deleting suggestion types.
Fixes for issue related to the Substitutions tab in an inventory model.
Phase 1 implementation of Services full view. Can view info and edit Productions Tasks, Skills & Qualifications, and Pricing. (editing more details to be implemented in Phase 2)
Pricing tab for inventory now editable.
Search results have been updated. Icons now show for inventory instead of model image, as well as other icon changes for other results.
Authorized Groups for workflow actions are now working properly. Unauthorized users will no longer see restricted workflow actions.
Fix for the quantity prompt on inventory tabs not automatically focusing the quantity number.
Full implementation of the following permissions: Can Edit Financial Documents, Can Manage Project Elements.
Fix for an issue that caused tiers to duplicate when switching between pricing models.
Column sorting improvements on inventory tab grids.
Implemented Inventory Schedule page
Tiered pricing model calculations now populating correctly when used on a line item
Implemented Suggestion Types page
Inventory “Alternatives” tab now fully functional (can add lines, edit lines, and even bulk edit lines)
Recent History fully implemented (you will see history from Flex4 and Flex5!)
Bulk Edit feature for financial documents implemented
Format Masks implemented for header block date/time fields
Improvements to inventory model image uploading (try dragging and dropping an image directly into the image area)
Maintenance Log popup fixes
Esc key no longer closes popup windows, and improvements to Esc key mapping when dropdown fields are open (specifically mapping the Esc key to the Time dropdown selector in the Edit Header popup)
Line item moving / drag and drop polishing
Fix for mute box changes not cascading from parent to child lines
Fix for quantity changes to a parent line item not changing child lines
Addressed fractional quantity rounding issues for new child lines
Improvements to the Serial Units tab (formally named Serial Numbers in Flex4), but not all buttons at the bottom of the tab are fully operational yet
Many improvements to user interface, field functionality, speed and performance, etc.
